order.disclaimer: We confirm within 24h · Free to cancel

howToOrder.heading: How to order your piece
howToOrder.body: Choose your piece, share your details, and we'll personally take care of the rest.
howToOrder.step1Desc: Explore our curated pieces and select the design that matches your space and intention.
howToOrder.step2Desc: Fill a simple form with your name, phone number, and location. Nothing more is needed.
howToOrder.step3Desc: We get in touch to confirm your order and arrange delivery tailored to your space.

tagline.headline: Objects shaped by restraint.
tagline.headlineSoft: Designed to exist quietly in your life, not dominate it.
tagline.headlineEnd: Made to age, not to be replaced.
tagline.craftDesc: Every piece is carefully checked and delivered with attention to quality and detail.
tagline.deliveryDesc: Quick and reliable shipping across Morocco, directly to your door.
tagline.supportDesc: We stay available to answer questions and guide you before and after your order.
tagline.returnsDesc: No questions asked. If it's not right, return it within 7 days easily.

about.headline: We don't sell things.
about.heroBody: Rooted in Moroccan craftsmanship. Built for people who want more freedom, more warmth, and more meaning in the way they live.
about.storyP1: Mipador started with a simple observation: the most beautiful spaces we'd ever been in had nothing to do with money. A riad in Fès. A workshop in the Atlas foothills. A terrace at golden hour with mint tea and nothing else.
about.storyP2: They had something harder to name — intention. Every object placed because it was loved. Every material chosen because it was honest. Every corner built to make you feel something.
about.storyP3: Just the feeling of a space that gives you energy, clarity, warmth, and freedom the moment you walk into it.
about.quote: "We buy things we don't need, to impress people we don't love."
about.quoteResponse: He was right. Most people do exactly that — and feel empty after.
about.manifesto: Mipador exists for the people who are done with that. Buy less. Choose honestly. Choose things because they make your life feel richer. Because they inspire you. Because they make your space feel like yours. Not to impress. Not to perform. Just to live better.

contact.heading: Get in
contact.body: Have a question or just want to say hello? Our studio is here to help you find the perfect fit.

faqs.heading: Questions.
faqs.body: Everything you need to know before bringing a Mipador piece into your space.

home.noFeatured: No pieces have been selected yet.
home.comingSoonBody: We don't rush what should be timeless. The next Mipador collection is being shaped slowly — by hand, by material, by patience.

footer.tagline: Furniture for spaces that feel alive — indoor and outdoor.
footer.journalBody: Inspirations, process notes, and new pieces — delivered slowly, intentionally.
footer.subscribedBody: You're now part of the Mipador world.

wishlist.emptyHint: Save the pieces you love to find them easily later.
